data.title: Headlam Faces Boardroom Challenge from 10% Shareholder First Seagull
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Headlam ( (GB:HEAD) ) has issued an update.

Headlam Group has received a requisition notice from shareholder First Seagull AS, which holds just over 10% of the company’s issued share capital, seeking to call a general meeting. The proposed resolutions aim to remove the chair and two non‑executive directors and replace them with two First Seagull nominees, including its managing director, in addition to the company’s already scheduled annual general meeting.

The board responded by expressing confidence in its recently refreshed composition, including a new executive team and two new non‑executive directors, and its ability to deliver the company’s turnaround strategy at pace. It also stressed its ongoing engagement with shareholders, said the annual general meeting on 20 May 2026 will proceed as planned, and advised shareholders to take no action while it considers the notice and prepares a further announcement.

Spark’s Take on HEAD Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, HEAD is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by deteriorating financial performance—contracting revenue, losses, and ongoing cash burn—alongside a weakening balance sheet. Technicals are bearish with the stock trading well below key moving averages, though the oversold readings temper the downside slightly. Valuation is not a clear support because the company is loss-making (negative P/E) and no dividend yield is provided.

To see Spark’s full report on HEAD stock, click here.

More about Headlam

Headlam Group is the UK’s leading floorcoverings distributor, working with global suppliers to provide a broad range of products to a large and diverse trade customer base. The company offers market‑leading service through its extensive product portfolio, ecommerce and marketing support, and nationwide delivery, operating multiple businesses and brands across the UK, France, and the Netherlands.

Average Trading Volume: 255,269

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: £22.55M

data.title: Pathos boosts AI PR platform with new CTO as tests show outperformance
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Pathos Communications Limited ( (GB:NEWS) ) has issued an update.

Pathos Communications, an AIM-quoted PR technology group serving SMEs with a pay-on-results model, has built its service around proprietary AI tools that streamline client acquisition, content creation and media placement across traditional and digital channels. The company’s focus on AI-supported workflows has underpinned rapid growth and multiple rankings among Europe’s fastest-growing firms.

The firm has reported early internal test results showing its AI “virtual publicist” Pressella booking roughly five to seven times more sales meetings than human colleagues using similar resources, and it has formed a dedicated development team to advance its PathosMind and Pressella platforms toward general availability. To steer this next phase, Pathos has appointed veteran technology executive Scott Feltham as chief technology officer, embedding him in daily operations to scale the company’s AI capabilities, support revenue growth and reinforce its positioning as a PR technology leader.

More about Pathos Communications Limited

Pathos Communications plc is a technology-enabled, human-led public relations company focused on democratising access to established news publications for SMEs and micro-SMEs worldwide. Operating a differentiated pay-on-results model rather than long-term retainers, it targets the more than 400 million smaller businesses that typically have limited PR budgets and need cost-efficient media exposure.

The company uses proprietary AI-driven platforms, PathosMind and Pressella, to help connect with clients, generate ideas, conduct market research and produce news articles with minimal human input. Pathos distributes client content across established news outlets, digital media, TV and podcasts, and has been recognised by the Financial Times, Deloitte and UBS as one of Europe’s fastest-growing advertising, marketing and professional services firms.

Average Trading Volume: 45,547

HeraMED Ltd. ( (AU:HMD) ) has issued an announcement.

data.title: Ascott supercharges loyalty scheme as ASR tops 8 million members
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

CapitaLand Investment Limited ( (SG:9CI) ) has issued an announcement.

CapitaLand Investment’s lodging arm, The Ascott Limited, is bolstering its Ascott Star Rewards programme as it marks its seventh anniversary and surpasses eight million members. The company, which operates more than 1,000 properties across over 40 countries under brands such as Ascott, Citadines, lyf and Oakwood, is using the loyalty platform to deepen direct customer relationships and support its target of 15 million members by 2028.

Ascott is expanding ASR into a broader travel rewards ecosystem by enabling points-to-miles conversion with KrisFlyer, adding Cathay Pacific as a partner, and allowing members to redeem points for flight credits across more than 640 airlines via Trip.com. Members can now also earn and redeem points on tours, curated lifestyle experiences and major sporting events, while new perks such as free preview stays at newly opened properties, complimentary breakfasts for top-tier members, and a “Fast Track to Free Nights” campaign are designed to lift member spend and loyalty.

The programme refresh extends to event planners through a revamped ASR Meeting Planner scheme, which awards points on rooms and events to capture growing MICE demand. By pairing apartment-style accommodation with flexible event spaces and bespoke catering, Ascott aims to differentiate itself in the business travel and events market, reinforcing ASR as a central tool to drive direct bookings, repeat stays and higher engagement across its global network.

The most recent analyst rating on (SG:9CI) stock is a Buy with a S$3.39 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on CapitaLand Investment Limited stock, see the SG:9CI Stock Forecast page.

More about CapitaLand Investment Limited

The Ascott Limited, the lodging arm of CapitaLand Investment, is a global hospitality company with more than 1,000 properties in over 230 cities across more than 40 countries. It manages and franchises serviced residences, hotels, resorts, social living properties and branded residences under brands such as Ascott, Citadines, lyf, Oakwood, Somerset and others, targeting both short-stay and long-stay travellers worldwide.

Ascott’s portfolio spans Asia Pacific, Central Asia, Europe, the Middle East, Africa and the U.S., positioning it as a major player in the extended-stay and serviced apartment segment. Its Ascott Star Rewards loyalty programme underpins its direct-to-consumer strategy by offering exclusive privileges and curated travel experiences aimed at driving repeat stays and higher member engagement.

Average Trading Volume: 11,050,574

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: S$14.22B

Curvebeam AI Ltd. ( (AU:CVB) ) has provided an announcement.

CurveBeam AI will release its quarterly Appendix 4C for the period ended 31 March 2026 before market open on 30 April, and is coupling the disclosure with an investor webinar hosted by its senior leadership team. The event, to be held at 9:30am AEST on the same day and later available as a recording, signals continued engagement with shareholders and the broader market as the company updates stakeholders on its financial and operational progress.

Investors and interested parties can register online to attend the webinar, submit questions live or in advance, and access a replay shortly after the session concludes. CurveBeam AI Limited is a medical technology company that develops, manufactures and sells specialised point-of-care CT imaging equipment paired with AI-enabled SaaS clinical assessment tools for musculoskeletal care. Its flagship HiRise scanner performs both weight-bearing and traditional CT scans, and the company operates from a corporate base in Melbourne with global headquarters in Hatfield, Pennsylvania, employing more than 70 staff.

data.title: Panoro Energy Sets Fully Virtual 2026 AGM for 21 May
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Panoro Energy ASA ( (PESAF) ) has issued an update.

Panoro Energy ASA has scheduled its 2026 Annual General Meeting for 21 May 2026 at 11:00am CEST, to be held exclusively as a virtual event via the Euronext Securities Portal, with no option for in-person attendance. Shareholders must be on the register as of 13 May 2026 to vote and are required to register their attendance by 19 May 2026 through Nordea Bank, after which they will receive access credentials for the online meeting.

The move to a fully digital AGM underscores Panoro’s continued use of electronic platforms for shareholder governance and may facilitate broader participation from its geographically dispersed investor base. By clearly setting record dates and attendance procedures, the company aims to ensure orderly decision-making and transparent engagement with shareholders across its African-focused portfolio of oil and gas assets.

More about Panoro Energy ASA

Panoro Energy ASA is an independent oil and gas exploration and production company based in London and listed on the main board of the Oslo Stock Exchange under the ticker PEN. The company holds production, exploration and development assets across Africa, including offshore licenses in Equatorial Guinea and southern Gabon, operated assets in Tunisia, and an onshore exploration right in South Africa.

data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

Macquarie Group Limited ( (AU:MQG) ) has issued an update.

Macquarie Group Limited has notified Regis Resources Limited that it has ceased to be a substantial holder in the gold producer, lodging a formal notice under Australian corporations law. The change reflects adjustments in Macquarie’s relevant voting interests and associated entities’ holdings, as recorded in its substantial holder disclosure.

The filing, signed by company secretary Simone Kovacic, also updates Regis on changes in associations among Macquarie Group’s controlled bodies corporate, which collectively held the interest. This move may signal a repositioning of Macquarie’s exposure to Regis Resources, with implications for the miner’s share register and the visibility of institutional support in its investor base.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:MQG) stock is a Hold with a A$235.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Macquarie Group Limited stock, see the AU:MQG Stock Forecast page.

More about Macquarie Group Limited

Macquarie Group Limited is a global financial services provider headquartered in Sydney, operating through entities such as Macquarie Bank Limited and Macquarie Investment Services Limited. The group is active across investment banking, asset management, and specialist financial services, with a wide network of controlled subsidiaries in infrastructure, energy, real assets, and other investment vehicles worldwide.

data.title: Neometals Rejects Mandrake Claim Dispute at Utah Brine Project
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest update is out from Neometals Ltd ( (AU:NMT) ).

Neometals has issued a clarification regarding its Utah Brine Project after Mandrake Resources alleged that lithium placer claims filed by Utah Brine Corporation, in which Neometals holds a 51% stake, overlap Mandrake’s existing claims and are therefore invalid. The company firmly rejects these allegations, stating that UBC’s U.S. legal counsel has confirmed the claims were validly filed in good faith over land open to location, supported by affidavit testimony.

UBC has also asked Mandrake to relinquish regulatory operatorship of certain wells, arguing Mandrake’s right to use them has expired, so UBC can be formally recognised as the authorised operator under Utah regulations. In parallel, UBC has secured an exclusive access and use licence with American Helium and Ascent Resources over 23 existing wells, oil and gas leases and related infrastructure, enabling brine sampling, test work and potential extraction, while filing additional potash and lithium placer tenure applications tied to those wells.

The dispute highlights the strategic importance of operatorship and tenure control at the Utah Brine Project, a key asset within Neometals’ critical minerals portfolio. By asserting the validity of its claims and strengthening access rights, Neometals is seeking to protect its U.S. lithium and potassium brine position and preserve the potential for rapid, capital‑efficient development that aligns with its broader clean‑energy materials strategy.

More about Neometals Ltd

Neometals Ltd is an Australian company focused on enabling the sustainable production of critical and valuable materials for a cleaner future. Its portfolio spans upstream mineral assets, including the Barrambie gold project in Western Australia, a high‑grade titanium and vanadium deposit at Barrambie now in divestment, and a controlling stake in the Utah Brine Project in the U.S., alongside proprietary low‑cost processing technologies for lithium chemicals and vanadium recovery. The Utah Brine Project gives Neometals exclusive access to inactive gas wells and existing infrastructure over more than 80,000 acres in Utah, aligning with U.S. critical minerals policy and supporting potential for rapid, capital‑efficient exploration and evaluation.

YTD Price Performance: -29.51%

Average Trading Volume: 797,212

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: A$38.65M

Learn more about NMT stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.
